evals.name: partner-contact-named-company
evals.prompt: Who runs partnerships at Gong? Find me the right person to reach out to about co-selling.
evals.expected_output: One or a few real individuals at Gong in a partnerships/alliances role, each with a LinkedIn /in/ profile URL, title, and a short rationale. Should not fabricate names or include job postings.

evals.name: prospect-icp-list
evals.prompt: Build me a ranked list of about 10 VPs or Heads of Partnerships at mid-market SaaS companies in the US that I could prospect.
evals.expected_output: A ranked table of ~10 real people with name, title, company, location, LinkedIn URL, and fit tier. Deduplicated, no job postings, honest about confidence.

evals.name: revops-fintech-prospects
evals.prompt: Find me a few RevOps leaders at fintech companies I could reach out to.
evals.expected_output: A short ranked list of real RevOps/Revenue Operations leaders at fintech companies with LinkedIn URLs and titles. Should ask a clarifying question only if truly needed, otherwise return candidates.
